zh.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Cameron於1277年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron47歲，母親Mrs. Roberta Cameron38歲。她於1320年與Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1372年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾德雷享年96歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Cameron于1277年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron47岁，母亲Mrs. Roberta Cameron38岁。她于1320年与Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn在苏格兰雷福福爾達利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1372年在苏格兰艾斯爾德雷享年96岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Cameron was born in 1277, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, was 47 and her mother, Mrs. Roberta Cameron, was 38. She married Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn in 1320, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1372, in Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 96, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Cameron est née en 1277, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Roberta Cameron, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn en 1320, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1372, à Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 96 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Cameron 1277 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron 47 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Roberta Cameron 38. Sie hat 1320 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1372 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Cameron è nata il nel 1277 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Roberta Cameron, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn nel 1320, nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1372, nel Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 96 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Cameronが1277年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameronは47歳，母Mrs. Roberta Cameronは38歳であった。1320年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーでSir Alan Stewart of Dreghornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1372年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアドレグホールンで96歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Cameron(이)가 1277년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Roberta Cameron(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1320년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1372년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 드레고른에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: Berwick-upon-Tweed, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Cameron nasceu em 1277, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Roberta Cameron, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn em 1320, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1372, em Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 96 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Cameron родилась в 1277 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Roberta Cameron, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn в 1320 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1372 г. в местности дрегаурн, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 96 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Cameron nació en 1277, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mrs. Roberta Cameron, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn en 1320, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1372, en Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 96 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
